2151230.name: RPG Maker MZ - PSYCHO DIVER
2151230.description:
Fill your modern or cyberpunk game with electronic jams with PSYCHO DIVER! ayato sound create is here with a pack of 25 tracks perfect for any game that needs great bops with synth instruments while your players explore streets lit with neon or travel between galaxies. Find music for sorrowful scenes, exciting getaways, battles against robot drones, and more in this music pack!

Features:

* 25 royalty free songs
* ogg, mp3, m4a, wav and looping ogg files included

Terms of Use:

* This pack is for use in RPG Maker Series or the engine of your choice.
* OK to be used in Commercial projects
* Contents can be edited
* OK for use in games with gore
* OK for use in adult-rated games
2151230.supported_languages: 英语, 日语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 俄语, 简体中文, 繁体中文, 韩语
